name: Salmon Trout Monastery
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the prepared trout in a buttered pan with the herbs. Cover with ale and cook gently.
2. Prepare the onions, mushrooms, and carrots separately by tossing them in butter. Add some of the cooking liquid to each and simmer until cooked.
3. Cook peas as usual.
4. When the trout is cooked, drain off the ale, remove the herbs, and place on a large dish. Keep hot.
5. Combine the remaining cooking liquid from the vegetables with the ale reduction (by about 1/4). Bind this mixture with a little butter and flour, then cook out. Season and mount liberally with butter.
6. Color to golden brown with caramel.
7. Pour the sauce over the trout. Arrange vegetables around. Garnish with parsley.
